homePage.p1: Follow the divisions, clubs and champions of a state that lives and breathes football.
homePage.featuredDescription: A quick look at teams with strong presence in Maranhao football.
homePage.quickAccessDescription: Jump in through the sections that matter most to state league fans.
homePage.citiesDescription: A good starting point to explore the current club base.
homePage.updatesDescription: Shortcuts to the strongest areas of the project right now.
homePage.updateSerieADescription: Standings, key zones and knockout round for the current season.
homePage.updateSerieBDescription: Follow groups, campaigns and the road to promotion.
homePage.updateChampionsDescription: See the latest champion and compare rankings by club and city.

footer.rights: Editorial content about clubs, campaigns and the history of Maranhao football.

leagueTable.desktopHint: On desktop, the full standings table stays available with every stat.
leagueTable.emptyDescription: We could not find season data for {{year}} yet.
leagueTable.overallDescription: Consolidated table for the selected season.

knockout.title: Knockout stage
knockout.playoffDescription: The two teams immediately above the directly relegated side play the relegation playoff.
knockout.noData: There is no knockout data for {{year}}.
knockout.noStageData: There is no data for the {{stageName}} stage.

serieA.description: Check the full standings and follow the final bracket in a mobile-friendly and desktop-friendly layout.

serieB.description: Follow the Serie B campaign with a mobile-first layout and quick access to each group.

teamList.p: Click a team to explore its history and curiosities.
teamList.emptyDescription: There are no clubs registered for this filter right now.

teamDetail.notFoundDescription: This club could not be found in the current project dataset.
teamDetail.noTitlesDescription: There are no Maranhao titles linked to this club yet.
teamDetail.noCuriositiesDescription: We are still organizing interesting facts about this team.
teamDetail.noSocialDescription: Official links have not been added for this club yet.

about.title: About the Project
about.description: This project aims to promote and organize information about the Maranhao Championship, allowing fans to follow team standings, learn more about the clubs and discover tournament facts and statistics.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: This channel opens your email app with the message prefilled. That keeps the contact flow clear and lets you review everything before sending.
contact.name: Your name
contact.success: Your email app was opened with the message prefilled.
contact.helper: When you submit, we will open your default email app with your message ready.
contact.directEmailDescription: If you want, use the address below without the form.
contact.responseTimeDescription: Right now contact happens by email. There is no direct form submission on the site yet.

champions.title: Maranhao Champions
champions.description: Explore the state league history with rankings, highlights and title distribution by club and city.
champions.rankingEyebrowTitles: See which clubs lifted the trophy the most.
champions.rankingEyebrowFinals: Compare who reached the Maranhao finals most often.
champions.rankingEyebrowCities: Discover which cities dominated the championship.
